summary: Iteration 125 - Code Quality Improvements Testing Complete. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Verified all code quality fixes: (1) ruff F821 returns 0 undefined variables, (2) agent_context_builder.py refactored with 8 helper functions + asyncio.gather for parallel DB queries, (3) Type hints added to all specified backend files, (4) Frontend stable keys in LandingPage.js and LegalPage.js, (5) useMemo for filteredFiles and tree in CodeRepoPanel.js, (6) NAV_MENUS in keyboard effect deps in WorkspacePage.js. Frontend loads correctly, login works.
critical_code_review_comments: agent_context_builder.py: Properly refactored from 1 monolithic function into 8 focused helper functions (_build_workspace_context, _build_project_context, _build_assignment_context, _build_cost_context, _build_user_context, _build_feedback_context, _build_skills_context, _build_badges_context)
agent_context_builder.py: Uses asyncio.gather for parallel DB queries (workspace, project, assignment, cost)

Type hints verified on: agent_certification.py (evaluate_badges -> List[str]), data_guard.py (sanitize_for_ai -> str), cost_batch_job.py (compute_cost -> float), agent_evaluator.py (run_real_assessment -> Dict[str, Any]), agent_prompt_builder.py (build_agent_prompt -> str), agent_skill_definitions.py (all public functions)
LandingPage.js: Uses stable keys (key={a.name}, key={s.label}, key={f.title}, key={s.step}, key={plan.name}) - no key={i} patterns
LegalPage.js: Uses lineKey pattern for content lines - no key={i} patterns
CodeRepoPanel.js: Imports useMemo and uses it for filteredFiles and tree memoization
WorkspacePage.js: Keyboard navigation effect deps include NAV_MENUS [openMenu, focusedIndex, setActiveTab, NAV_MENUS]

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Landing page and auth page load correctly, login works
